thesis: Deeply cheap (z_val ~+2.1) large-cap with strongly rising revisions and positive momentum — the clearest value+revision+momentum triple in the set; top-conviction add.
falsification: Crude/refining margins roll over and revisions turn down, or ONGC underperforms NIFTY 500 over the next quarter despite the cheapness.

thesis: Iron-ore/steel-chain cyclical with strongly rising revisions and positive momentum; a liquid large-cap way to express the commodity-revision tilt.
falsification: Steel/iron-ore prices fall and analyst revisions reverse, or the name lags the benchmark over the next quarter.

thesis: Strong peer-relative momentum (z_mom ~+1.4) plus rising revisions in aluminium — a momentum-led complement to my cheaper metals.
falsification: Aluminium prices and momentum fade and revisions stall, or it underperforms HINDALCO/NMDC over the next quarter.

thesis: Diversified large-cap aluminium/copper with positive momentum and rising revisions; core cyclical hold, sized up modestly.
falsification: Base-metal prices weaken and revisions roll over, or it lags the metals basket I am building.

thesis: (Already specified above.)
falsification: (Already specified above.)

thesis: Injectables franchise with strongly rising revisions and positive momentum; a higher-quality revision-led hold I keep at conviction weight.
falsification: US injectables pricing/FDA setback turns revisions down, or momentum reverses sharply.

thesis: Diversified franchise (VSF, chemicals, paints optionality) with strongly rising revisions; a quality revision-led add outside the commodity cluster.
falsification: Paints/VSF competition pressures earnings and revisions fade, or the name lags the benchmark over the quarter.

thesis: Gold-loan leader with strongly rising revisions and a high gold-price tailwind; adds financials breadth away from banks.
falsification: Gold prices fall or regulatory tightening hits gold-loan growth and revisions reverse.

thesis: Deeply underowned large-cap insurer with very strong rising revisions and modest cheapness; a contrarian value+revision add.
falsification: Embedded-value/VNB disappointment turns revisions down, or LICI keeps de-rating versus private insurers.

thesis: Eyewear category leader with strongly rising revisions and positive momentum post-listing; keep at conviction weight as a structural-consumer tilt.
falsification: Growth/margin disappointment cuts revisions, or post-IPO momentum reverses.

thesis: Mid/large IT services with strongly rising revisions; the revision strength offsets weak recent momentum — a quality IT hold.
falsification: Deal-pipeline/discretionary-spend weakness turns revisions down, or the stock keeps underperforming the IT basket.

thesis: Beauty/fashion e-commerce with strongly rising revisions; small high-growth consumer-internet position sized modestly given the rich valuation.
falsification: Take-rate/contribution-margin disappointment cuts revisions, or the stock breaks down on momentum.

thesis: Mid-cap bank with rising revisions and cheapness; a recovery-led financials add that diversifies my bank exposure away from the megacaps.
falsification: Asset-quality or governance concerns re-emerge and revisions reverse, or the name keeps underperforming the bank index.

thesis: Value-commerce platform at a reasonable valuation; structural e-commerce hold, trimmed modestly from 2.0% as revisions are only neutral, not rising.
falsification: Take-rate/path-to-profit disappoints and revisions turn negative, or growth decelerates sharply.

thesis: Passenger-vehicle franchise that is cheap (z_val ~+2.1) on a cyclical recovery; kept on valuation, trimmed slightly given weak revisions.
falsification: Volume/margin disappointment with falling revisions, or the deep cheapness fails to close as the stock keeps de-rating.

thesis: Deep-value refiner held purely on cheapness; revisions are weak/falling so I cut from 1.87% to a smaller value bet rather than exit outright.
falsification: GRMs collapse and revisions keep falling, or the value never re-rates while peers move.

thesis: Core franchise bank held near benchmark weight for diversification and beta; not a high-conviction tilt.
falsification: Asset-quality deterioration or revision rollover relative to peers.

thesis: Best-in-class private bank; a low-tracking-error core anchor for the financials sleeve.
falsification: Margin/credit-cost surprise or sustained underperformance versus the bank index.

thesis: Largest PSU bank, reasonably cheap; core financials hold for diversification.
falsification: Asset-quality or capital concerns and falling revisions versus private peers.

thesis: Largest private bank by index weight; held to avoid a large active underweight versus NIFTY 500.
falsification: Post-merger margin drag persists and the name keeps lagging the index.

thesis: Quality bank held for diversification; trimmed modestly given soft momentum and only middling revisions.
falsification: Growth/margin disappointment or continued de-rating versus peers.

thesis: Bellwether IT services held for index alignment; revisions are only middling so no overweight.
falsification: Discretionary-spend weakness cuts revisions and IT keeps underperforming.

thesis: Margin-recovery IT story with reasonable revisions; kept but trimmed as momentum is soft.
falsification: Margin program stalls and revisions roll over, or it lags the IT basket.

thesis: Large IT services name with the weakest momentum in my IT sleeve; trimmed to a small hold.
falsification: Momentum and revisions both keep deteriorating versus peers.

thesis: Largest index constituent; held for tracking-error control despite only neutral signals.
falsification: Sustained underperformance versus the index with falling revisions.

thesis: Telecom leader with pricing tailwinds; held near benchmark weight.
falsification: ARPU/subscriber disappointment and revision rollover.

thesis: Defensive power utility held for yield and stability; trimmed as revisions are only middling.
falsification: Capex/tariff disappointment and revisions turn down.

thesis: Well-run diversified NBFC with rising revisions; a quality financials hold.
falsification: Asset-quality stress in vehicle/home finance and revision rollover.

thesis: Forgings/defense-diversified cyclical with positive momentum and rising revisions; keep at weight.
falsification: Auto/export demand softens and revisions fall, or momentum reverses.

thesis: Integrated steel producer held as part of the metals sleeve at a modest weight.
falsification: Steel spreads compress and the name lags the metals basket.

thesis: SUV and tractor leader held for cyclical-consumer exposure; modest weight given soft momentum.
falsification: Volume/margin disappointment and falling revisions.

thesis: Cheap, high-yield diversified FMCG held as a defensive ballast for the hybrid book.
falsification: Cigarette-tax shock or sustained underperformance with falling revisions.

thesis: Defense electronics leader with a strong order book; structural hold at modest weight.
falsification: Order-inflow slowdown and revision rollover.

thesis: Jewellery/watches leader held as a structural premium-consumption play.
falsification: Jewellery margin/demand disappointment and revisions fall.

thesis: Fast-growing value retailer held as a structural consumer-discretionary position.
falsification: Same-store-sales slowdown and revision rollover or valuation reset.

thesis: Best-in-class grocery retailer held as a structural consumption play.
falsification: Margin/online-competition pressure and revisions fall.

thesis: Leading pharma franchise held as a defensive healthcare anchor.
falsification: Specialty/US pipeline setback and revisions turn down.

thesis: Leading hospital network held as a structural healthcare-services play.
falsification: Occupancy/ARPOB disappointment and revisions roll over.

thesis: Quality general insurer held for financials breadth at a small weight.
falsification: Combined-ratio deterioration and revision rollover.

thesis: Leading life insurer held for financials breadth at a small weight.
falsification: VNB-margin disappointment and revisions fall.

thesis: Vehicle-finance NBFC kept small; revisions are falling so I reduce rather than add.
